metadata.description: Skills for remote StarRocks development over SSH: connection, build, test, deploy, crash diagnosis, live-cluster inspection & rollout, PR backport, benchmark-cluster management, and static bug-scan with fault-injection reproduction.

plugins.name: starrocks-dev
plugins.description: Drive a remote StarRocks dev host over SSH — set up the connection, build FE/BE, deploy/start a cluster, inspect a live cluster for perf/correctness, roll out binaries, backport merged PRs to release branches (conflict-resolve + branch-image verify), manage named benchmark/test clusters behind a jump host (connect + wake suspended FE/BE), and statically scan modules for bugs then reproduce them (SQLTest/failpoint/strace/eBPF/kernel fault injection) and record findings.
